items.title: Auburndale Point Apartments
items.summary: A new apartment community is planned with resort-style amenities and access to growing Central Polk employment centers.

items.title: Texas Roadhouse Coming to Auburndale
items.summary: A new restaurant project is being tracked in Auburndale as part of the county's growing dining scene.

items.title: Publix at Villamar Commons
items.summary: Retail growth continues around Winter Haven with new grocery-anchored commercial activity.

items.title: Hotel Project in Davenport
items.summary: Davenport remains a strong hotel market because of tourism and regional population growth.

items.title: US 27 Interchange Improvement Project
items.summary: Transportation improvements continue along major growth corridors in northeast Polk County.
